# AiPay

> Kaspi Pay payment automation platform for businesses in Kazakhstan. Instant verification, phone-number invoicing, webhook notifications, fiscal receipts, and a developer API for CRMs, bots, and booking systems.

AiPay automates Kaspi Pay payment acceptance for businesses: invoice creation by phone number, real-time payment verification 24/7, webhook callbacks, and automatic fiscal receipt generation. It integrates with CRMs, Telegram/WhatsApp bots, and booking platforms via REST API.

## Key Features

- **Instant Payment Verification**: Automatic 24/7 Kaspi Pay payment confirmation without manual screenshot checks
- **Phone-Number Invoicing**: Generate Kaspi Pay invoices using only the customer's phone number
- **Webhook Notifications**: Real-time HTTP callbacks on payment status changes for system-to-system integration
- **Fiscal Receipts**: Automatic fiscal receipt (чек) generation compliant with Kazakhstan tax regulations
- **REST API**: Full-featured API for developers to integrate payment automation into any platform
- **Multi-Terminal Support**: Manage multiple Kaspi terminals from a single dashboard

## Target Industries

- Beauty salons and service businesses (prepayment to reduce no-shows)
- Medical centers (appointment deposits and remote payments)
- Instagram shops and e-commerce (automated order-to-delivery payment flow)
- Restaurants and delivery services (order payment automation)
- Info-businesses (instant digital product delivery upon payment)

## Integration Partners

- [Altegio](https://aipay.kz/ru/integrations/altegio) — CRM for beauty and service businesses
- [PulseAI](https://aipay.kz/ru/integrations/pulseai) — AI-powered booking assistant
- [STIKER.AI](https://aipay.kz/ru/integrations/stiker-ai) — Telegram/WhatsApp bot builder
- [Baskaru Pro](https://aipay.kz/ru/integrations/baskaru-pro) — Business management platform

## Pages

- [Homepage](https://aipay.kz/ru): Main landing page with product overview, pricing, and use cases
- [Developers](https://aipay.kz/ru/developers): API documentation overview, integration flow, and developer resources
- [Beauty Salon Prepayment](https://aipay.kz/ru/industries/beauty-salon-prepayment): Kaspi Pay for salons and service bookings
- [Medical Center Payments](https://aipay.kz/ru/industries/medical-center-payments): Payment automation for clinics
- [Restaurant & Delivery Payments](https://aipay.kz/ru/industries/restaurant-delivery-payments): Order payment automation
- [Instagram Shop Invoices](https://aipay.kz/ru/industries/instagram-shop-kaspi-invoices): Kaspi invoicing for social commerce

## Pricing

- 7-day free trial, no card required
- 25,000 KZT per terminal per month (3-month minimum)
- Custom integrations available (priced per specification)

## Locales

Available in Russian (ru), Kazakh (kk), and English (en). Default locale is Russian.
All pages are accessible at `https://aipay.kz/{locale}/{path}`.

- Website: https://aipay.kz
